subcodes.first_line: O Persian friends, the noble and kindly Khudabakhsh hath penned a letter containing the blessed names of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسی مهتر مهربان خدابخش نامه ای نگاشته و نامهای همایون آن یاران
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @Manifestation of God as educator
